parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.access_token,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'prompts' as prompts,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'response_delay' as delay,
  a.id as chatwoot_account_id,
  a.custom_attributes->'config'->'post_venta_ia' as pv_ia,
  (SELECT id FROM inboxes
   WHERE account_id = a.id
   AND name ILIKE '%Post-venta (MercadoLibre)%'
   LIMIT 1) as meli_inbox_id,
  (SELECT id FROM teams
   WHERE account_id = a.id
   AND name ILIKE '%Post-Venta%'
   LIMIT 1) as meli_team_id
FROM meli_credentials c
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = c.account_id
WHERE c.ml_user_id = '{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.body.user_id }}';

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.ml_user_id }, to: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.buyer_user_id }, text: $('generate_logistics_response').item.json.choices[0].message.content }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.ml_user_id }, to: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.buyer_user_id }, text: $('generate_support_response').item.json.choices[0].message.content }) }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
=⚠️ Handover Sugerido

El cliente envió un mensaje clasificado como **RECLAMO** y la IA ha silenciado sus respuestas automáticas.

📝 Mensaje del cliente:
"{{ $('context_assembler').item.json.message }}"

📦 Contexto del pedido:
{{ $('context_assembler').item.json.order_context }}

🚚 Estado del envío:
{{ $('context_assembler').item.json.shipment_context }}

Por favor intervenís a la brevedad.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.ml_user_id }, to: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.buyer_user_id }, text: $('generate_close_response').item.json.choices[0].message.content }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.ml_user_id }, to: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.buyer_user_id }, text: $('context_assembler').item.json.pv_ia?.prompts?.escalacion || 'Lamentamos el inconveniente. Un especialista de nuestro equipo se va a comunicar con vos a la brevedad.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.ml_user_id }, to: { user_id: $('context_assembler').item.json.buyer_user_id }, text: $('generate_saludo_response').item.json.choices[0].message.content }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO meli_questions (question_id, account_id, status)
SELECT
  'ms_' || '{{ $input.first().json.body._id }}',
  (SELECT account_id FROM meli_credentials WHERE ml_user_id = '{{ $input.first().json.body.user_id }}'),
  'processing'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM meli_questions WHERE question_id = 'ms_' || '{{ $input.first().json.body._id }}'
)
RETURNING question_id;
